mapper.select: SELECT * FROM countdown WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_top DESC, target_date ASC
SELECT * FROM countdown WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND category = #{category} ORDER BY is_top DESC, target_date ASC
SELECT * FROM countdown ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE countdown SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, target_date = #{targetDate}, target_time = #{targetTime}, color = #{color}, icon = #{icon}, is_top = #{isTop}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE countdown SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE countdown SET is_top = #{isTop} WHERE id = #{id}
